nameEn: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation
description: The largest conference in robotics, organized by IEEE, covering robot manipulation, mobile robots, perception, control, and human-robot interaction across all areas of robotics. With thousands of papers presented annually, ICRA is one of the two premier robotics venues alongside RSS, with very active industry participation.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Extrinsic Contact Sensing with Relative-Motion Tracking from Distributed Tactile Measurements
bestPapers.authors: Daolin Ma, Siyuan Dong, Alberto Rodriguez

bestPapers.paperTitle: Distributed Data-Driven Predictive Control for Multi-Agent Collaborative Legged Locomotion
MAC-VO: Metrics-aware Covariance for Learning-based Stereo Visual Odometry
Robo-DM: Efficient Robot Big Data Management
SARA-RT: Scaling up Robotics Transformers with Self-Adaptive Robust Attention

descriptionKo: 로보틱스 분야의 최대 규모 학회로, IEEE에서 주관합니다. 로봇 조작, 이동 로봇, 로봇 인식, 제어, 인간-로봇 상호작용 등 로보틱스 전 분야를 다루며, 매년 수천 편의 논문이 발표됩니다. RSS와 함께 로보틱스의 양대 학회로, 산업계 참여도 매우 활발합니다.
descriptionEn: The largest conference in robotics, organized by IEEE, covering robot manipulation, mobile robots, perception, control, and human-robot interaction across all areas of robotics. With thousands of papers presented annually, ICRA is one of the two premier robotics venues alongside RSS, with very active industry participation.
